artifact.source:
root = Card([content], "Error Rate Over Time", "ERROR lines per 10-minute bucket from app.log", "lg", true)

errorData = Query("log_series", {file: "./logs/app.log", groupBy: "10m", match: "ERROR"}, {data: defaultBuckets, x: "bucket", y: "count"})

defaultBuckets = [
  {bucket: "09:00", count: 1},
  {bucket: "09:10", count: 2},
  {bucket: "09:20", count: 6},
  {bucket: "09:30", count: 7},
  {bucket: "09:40", count: 2},
  {bucket: "09:50", count: 1}
]

errorChart = Chart("bar", errorData.data, errorData.x, errorData.y, "ERROR Lines per 10-Minute Bucket", 360)

content = Stack([errorChart], "vertical", "lg")

toolInput.title: Chart the error rate over time from a log file on disk

failureReasons: content-non-empty: expected >=200 visible chars and >=120px of painted content, observed 127 chars and 876px — "Error Rate Over Time ERROR lines per 10-minute bucket from app.log ERROR Lines per 10-Minute Bucket 09:00 09:10 09:20 09:30 09:40 09:50 0 3 6 9 12 0 1 5 11 4 1"

artifact.source:
root = Card([content], "Error Rate Over Time", "ERROR lines per 10-minute bucket from app.log", "lg", true)

errorData = Query("log_series", {file: "./logs/app.log", groupBy: "10m", match: "ERROR"}, {data: defaultBuckets, x: "bucket", y: "count"})

defaultBuckets = [
  {bucket: "09:00", count: 1},
  {bucket: "09:10", count: 2},
  {bucket: "09:20", count: 6},
  {bucket: "09:30", count: 7},
  {bucket: "09:40", count: 2},
  {bucket: "09:50", count: 1}
]

introText = Text("This chart plots the number of ERROR-level log lines from app.log, bucketed into ten-minute windows starting at each label on the x-axis. Errors cluster noticeably in the middle of the hour before tapering off.", "muted")

errorChart = Chart("bar", errorData.data, errorData.x, errorData.y, "ERROR Lines per 10-Minute Bucket", 360)

tableCols = [{key: "bucket", label: "Bucket Start"}, {key: "count", label: "ERROR Count"}]
bucketTable = DataTable("ERROR counts by bucket", tableCols, errorData.data, true)

content = Stack([introText, errorChart, bucketTable], "vertical", "lg")

bucketTable = DataTable("ERROR counts by bucket", tableCols, errorData.data, true)

content = Stack([introText, errorChart, bucketTable], "vertical", "lg")
